objective: Make routine maintenance governed, scheduled, and safe.
safety_policy: No package upgrades from routine report scripts.
No destructive cleanup without operator-approved apply step.
Separate live systemd checks from offline unit-file validation.

jobs.policy: fetch/prune/gc as configured, no branch deletion
repair or disable before relying on timer
repair or disable before relying on timer

completion_gate: Every known timer has an authority record with schedule, target, safety mode, and broken-target handling.
